name: Tofu Burgers (Lappe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the tofu.
2. Combine the mashed tofu with grated carrot, minced leeks, and ground roasted sesame seeds.
3. Knead the mixture as you would bread dough for 3 minutes until smooth.
4. Lightly oil your palms, then shape the mixture into patties.
5. Fry the patties in oil, similar to frying regular meat burgers, until they are crisp and nicely browned on each side (about 4 minutes per side).
6. Drain excess oil and serve hot in a hamburger bun with mustard, lettuce, ketchup, pickle, and tomato.
